bird.name: 蓝脸吸蜜鸟
bird.summary: 蓝脸吸蜜鸟（学名：Entomyzon cyanotis），是雀形目吸蜜鸟科蓝脸吸蜜鸟（学名：Entomyzon）的唯一一种鸟类。 蓝脸吸蜜鸟体重约105.26克，翼长约150.5毫米，嘴峰长约32.9毫米，喙宽度约5.1毫米，喙厚度约7.1毫米，跗蹠长约31.9毫米，尾长约12…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 格蘭坪國家公園
locations.summary: 格蘭坪國家公園（英語：Grampians National Park）位於澳洲維多利亞州西部平原上，在墨爾本西北方260公里，佔地16萬7219公頃。此地有奇岩怪石、野生動物、鳥類，還有瀑布、流水。並以及原住民岩畫藝術聞名。於1984年7…

locations.name: Ararat, Victoria
locations.summary: Ararat (Djabwurrung: Tallarambooroo) is a town in the Central Highlands region in Victoria, Australia, about 198 kilome…

locations.name: St Arnaud, Victoria
locations.summary: St Arnaud is a town in the Wimmera region of Victoria, Australia, 244 kilometres north west of the capital Melbourne.

relations.subject: 蓝脸吸蜜鸟
relations.evidence: Adults have a blue area of bare skin on each side of the face readily distinguishing them from juveniles, which have yellow or green patches of bare skin.thumb|Blue-faced honeyeater - Canungra - Queensland - Australia Found in open woodland, parks and gardens, the blue-faced honeyeater is common in northern and eastern Australia, and southern New Guinea

relations.evidence: It is also found in the Grampians region, particularly in the vicinity of Stawell, Ararat and St Arnaud, with rare reports from southwestern Victoria
